text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while walking along the river...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah! What say you to that, Digital?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ggnaa, b-beautiful! S-s-sooo sublime!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Trainer! Exactly what your eyes bear
witness to, of course!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I think I'm gonna faint!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Observing the two does little to explain the
situation, so I ask for details.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I awaken to a refreshing morning... I am
strolling alongside the lovely river...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And lo! What a stunning work of art nature has
created this day!
Wooookljh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Was that the wind? An oddly unpleasant
sound, if it were.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter. First in order is a close-up for my next
edition of collectible portraits.
Wh-haaa?! New photos?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HYEEEEWRE?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that is what transpired, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital was observing me from a concealed spot
in the forest. And so, I brought her here to the
best seat in the house!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gawww... She's showing mercy. That's a new core
memory, straight up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But hey, Opera O? How'd you even know I was
there at all?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nobody gets in the way of my precious Umas
pairing up. And to make sure of that, if I have to
hide in the ceiling, walls—in this case, trees—I'll
do it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'd turn into air if I only could. But I didn't mean
to be a stone in your way!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Digital, you are no stone. You are... my fan.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tell me—these ears and hands of mine, what are
they for?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
These ears, to hear what my fans desire. These
hands, to guide you to the future.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For the destined-to-be Centurial Overlord,
engaging with a fan is no trouble in the least.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyeeeh! She's got the face and heart of a saint!
choice_data_list:
I guess support from your fans can keep you
motivated.
So, don't you have some close-ups to take?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Indeed!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, Digital. I'll show you the strength in my
stride.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now with even more splendor, thanks to your
enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooogh, I'll follow you anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, T.M. Opera O and Agnes Digital run off
together, high-pitched giggles and excited
chatter echoing in their wake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course, realizing their clamor is likely to
disturb the surrounding residents, I hastily guide
them back to the academy's training track.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's right. Your ability to comprehend
situations is effortless and astute. That's why
you're my trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, today I will exhibit my certitude... Digital, I
shall entrust you with capturing my breathtaking
visage!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-you... want me to?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Who better than one who has observed
my beauty up close?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, even the spirits who inhabit this very river
are enthralled by my appearance. It must be
immortalized on film! Now, shoot!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! Time to dial my camera skills up to
eleven!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it turns out, Agnes Digital's exceptional
photography skills appear authentic. T.M. Opera
O praises the "certitude" on display in her
resulting photo.
